wminc-code-macrolanguage: [[wikipedia:$2 language|"$3" language]] la an…õ [[wikipedia:ISO 639 macrolanguage|macrolanguage]],ka m…Ēr pian'ad ban…õ d…Ēl la nwa:
wminc-code-collective: Koot kan…õ an "$1" la p č b…õ…õ tis pian'ad yinne si'aa,amaa ka b…õ…õ tis pian'ad gum sieba ka li y č' čr an ye [[wikipedia:$2 language|"$3" languages]]
wminc-code-retired: Pian'ad kaŇča koot la tiak ya ka p č l…õm b…õ tis Pin'il čg pian'ad la.
wminc-custom-editnotice-2: A-nyaŇči pa'an pian'ad ban…õ ka f č nyaŇči n…Ēk t čm la,b…õllimn…õ n…Ēkim $1 nwa t čm. Tituunli, f č buudi pian'ad ya'a an…õ K čsaal ka f č na nyaŇči pian' Na'asaal s č' čŇča, n…Ēkim $2 t čm
wminc-custom-featuredwikis-approved: Di siak di'e bama ka/b…õ…õ li maal:
wminc-custom-featuredwikis-active: Bama v če b…õ…õ t čm ka li k č yuug…õ ba na di'e ba m…õŇč zin'ig:
wminc-custom-featuredwikis-permanent: Bama na t čn'e kp…õlim kp…õ:
wminc-custom-newarticletext-noprefix: B…õllimn…õ baŇčim: f č maan n…õ lakir ka [[$1|prefix]] kae.
wminc-custom-newarticletext-withprefix-3: F č maan n…õ ([[$1|prefixed]])lakir paal ka li y č' čr an "{{FULLPAGENAME}}".
wminc-custom-newarticletext-withprefix-4: M…õ Paasim prefixes nam tisi f č link nam nwa: [[Page title]] to [[Wx/xx/Page title]] and {{Page title}} to {{Wx/xx/Page title}}.
wminc-custom-newarticletext-withprefix-5: A-maal N…õ'…õŇča s č' čŇčaa, f č t čn'e zaŇč [[$1|Add prefix gate]] niŇč
wminc-custom-tb-incorrect-title-title: F č m…Ē…Ēd ye f č maal lakir n…õ y č' čgb…õl čŇč
wminc-custom-tb-incorrect-title-text:
SaŇča pamm y č' čr la p č m…Ēr [[$1|prefix]] b…õ…õ di b…õn…õ suosi'a kan…õ m…Ēr gb…õl čŇč ( ban…õ m…Ēr vubiel b…õda b…õ prefix ni, n…õ trailing slash n…õ ban…õ b…õ.).
F č ya'a yin…õ zin'isi'a ke kp…õ' na,b…õllimn…õ l…õm ti maal link la ka y č' čn maal lakir ka li y č' čr d…Ēl tituaa. F č ya'a m…Ē…Ēd n…õ ye kpa maal lakir la, b…õllimn…õ maalim lakir la li y č' čr d…Ēl b…õ…õ tu'al tituaa.
Ka saŇča kan…õ ka n…õ'…õŇča gu'udif ka f č k č nyaŇči maal lakir si'a kan…õ ka f č mi' s č' čŇča ye li m…Ēr y č' čr kan…õ an tituaa, b…õllimn…õ [[$2|k…õl ka Kp…õ…õmnam baŇči li y…õla]].
wminc-custom-tb-invalid-code-title: F č m…Ē…Ēd n…õ ye f č maal lakir kan…õ ka [[$1|ISO 639-1 b…õ…õ -3 koot]] kan…õ t čm kae
wminc-custom-tb-invalid-code-text:
Koot kaŇča p č t čmma b…õ…õ ka'a n…õ pian'ad kan…õ siak Wikipedia t č čm paala b čnn…õ.
F č ya'a yin…õ lakir si'a ni ke kp…õ' na,b…õllimn…õ l…õm ti maal link la ka nyaan maal lakir kan…õ y č' čri d…Ēl tituaa la.

ka li ya'a ti an…õ ye n…õ'…õŇča gu'udif suor ka f č k č nyaŇči maal lakir si'a kan…õ ka f č t…õn'…õs ye li m…Ēr koot ISO 639-3 b…õ…õ -3 koot kan…õ t čm b…õ…õ an pian'ad kan…õ ka ba siak di'e, b…õllimn…õ [[$1|k…õl ka Kp…õ…õmnam baŇči li y…õla ]]
wminc-custom-tb-space-colon: BaŇčir t…Ē…Ēlim nam zug, y č' čr p č nar ye li pin'il n…õ paal č b…õ…õ k…Ēl…Ēn.
gadget-addprefix: Add prefix: ZaŇčim prefixes nam paas link namin saŇča kan…õ ka f č maan lakir.
wminc-gadget-addprefix-help: Di p č l…õn nar ye f č m…Ēr prefix la niŇčid ya'asa f č ya'a ti d…õmisid lakir kaŇčaa. Li m…õŇč na paas f č ya'a zaŇč lakir kaŇča pa'al s…Ē' w čsa.
gadget-interwiki: Interwiki: Paasimi li paŇč ka li paas ka pa'al s č čgin pian'ad suon…Ēya yi wikidata ni.
wminc-gadget-iw-dialog-text: N…Ēkim gba čŇč kaŇča n paas interwiki linknam d…Ēlisid wikidata la čkin. K čd čm n…Ēkim wikidata la čk ID b…õ…õ URL labil la čk si'a b…õ…õ s…Ēb čg kan…õ d…õŇčim maal b…õ pian'asi'a ni n b…õ gbinnin nwa ka din "{{int:wminc-gadget-iw-dialog-publish}}"
wminc-gadget-iw-dialog-replace-text: F č ya'a din "{{int:wminc-gadget-iw-dialog-publish}}", f č na l…õbig wiki k čd čr la tiak n…õ interwiki suon…Ēnya ban…õ yi wikidata ni la n b…õ lakir kaŇča ni. S…Ēb labaar kan…õ ka f č na zaŇč gaŇč wikidata la čk la an lin…õ d…Ēl nwa'.
wminc-gadget-iw-dialog-replace-editinste: Ka lin na ya'a ka' s čm, m b…õllimn…õ d…õmisim lakir la n sian'al suon…Ē…Ēr la s č' čŇča.
wminc-gadget-iw-error-title: Interwiki la čk bil gb…õl čŇč
wminc-gadget-iw-error-invalid: Wikidata ID kan…õ ka kp…õn'…õs la b…õ…õ lakir kan…õ pa'a t…Ē'…ĒŇč la p č b…õ…õ,  b…õ…õ lakir la p č t…Ē'…ĒŇč n…õ wikidata. M b…õllimn…õ maligim m…Ē ya'as.
wminc-gadget-iw-error-reload: M b…õllimn…õ maligim la'as lakir la ka m…Ē ya'as.
tag-gadget-interwiki-description: D…õmisa ban…õ ka ba zaŇč interwiki masin bil n…Ēk interwiki suon…Ēnya paas.
gadget-settestwikipreference: Paasim "pian'ad maal čg" ka maal (t č čma makir) ka li an f č t č čma makir b…Ētt…Ēn kan…õ wa'ae kpikp…õŇč f…Ēllin la, saŇča kan…õ ka f č g…Ēsid kpansib wiki nam.
wminc-gadget-twpref-setlang-tooltip: Maligim zi'el f čn t čm zin'isi'a pian'ad tis $1
wminc-gadget-twpref-setwiki: Maalim $1 ka li an f č t č čma makir
wminc-gadget-twpref-setwiki-tooltip: Maalim $1 ka li an f č t č čma makir, ala ka lakisa paala ban…õ ka f č maal la na la'am paas t č čm kaŇča ni.
wminc-infopage-title-status-approved: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki makir ka ba siak di'e li b…õ Wikipedia Incubator ni
wminc-infopage-title-status-default: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki makir kan…õ b…õ Wikimedia Incubator la ni.
wminc-infopage-title-status-imported: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki makir kan…õ yi zin'isi'a na ka b…õ Wikipedia incubator la ni.
wminc-infopage-title-status-invalidcode: Wiki makir kaŇča m…Ēri pian'ad koot kan…õ p č v če ya, alazug li yiis ya [[$1|ISO 639]].
wminc-infopage-title-status-open: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki makir paal č kan…õ b…õ Wikimedia Incubator la ni.
wminc-infopage-title-status-rejected: Buudi pian'ad Kp…õ…õmnam daa zan'as a-kpans wiki kaŇča n…õ ka yiisi li bas.
wminc-infopage-title-status-tocreate: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki paal č kan…õ b…õ Wikimedia Incubator la ni.
wminc-infopage-title-status-toimport: N…õ'…õŇča an…õ wiki makir kan…õ b…õ Wikipedia Incubator la ni ka b…Ē…Ēd ye yi kp…õn' kp…õ' na.
wminc-infopage-text-approved-prelangcom: T č čm kan…õ ka ba daa b…Ē…Ēd la maali ya. BaŇčim ye na daa siak di'e b…Ē…Ēdim kaŇča n…õ ka [[$3|language proposal policy]] zi'esim nyaan zaŇč t čm, ka li p č s čm ye li zaŇči lieb b čnkan…õ an b…õog b…Ē…Ēdim nama (m…õ g…Ēsim [[$1|site creation log]]).
wminc-infopage-text-approved: [[$2|Language committee]] dim siaki di'e wiki makir kaŇča (m…õ g…Ēsim [[$1|site creation log]]).
wminc-infopage-text-default: B…Ēdig b…õ…õ gb…õl čŇč paramita "$4". G…Ēsim [[$5|kp…õla labaar b…õdeg č]] kat wa'ae n…õ t…õmpulet kaŇča y…õla.
wminc-infopage-text-imported: Ba zaŇč wiki kaŇča yin…õ [[$6| zin'isi'a n kp…õn' kp…õla na]] wiki la daa y…Ē la nya'aŇč. F č ya'a b…Ē…Ēd ye f č (maligim pin'il) t č čm kaŇča, f č n…Ēk lakisa bama pin'ili li.
wminc-infopage-text-invalidcode: Wiki makir kaŇča m…Ēri pian'ad koot [[$7|ISO 639]] kan…õ p č v če ya, alazug li yiis ya. XML faal t čn'e b…õ (bu'osim [[$8|the administrators]]) lin…õ t čn'e nyaŇči yiis t…Ēlis keŇč non-wikimedia wiki ni.
wminc-infopage-text-open: Wiki makir kaŇča y…Ē'…Ēg n…õ b…õ…õ li pa'al nyain ye li m…Ēr suor si'el m…õkama ni. Kp…õmisidif ye f č s čŇč paas pian'ad f č ya'a mi'i buudi pian'ad kaŇča. M…õ g…Ēsim [[$9|the contribution manual]] tis pian' pa'al kat wa'ae n…õ lin…õ nar ye f č maal.
wminc-infopage-text-rejected:
[[$2|Language
 Committee]] dim daa zan'as wiki makir kaŇča n…õ,ka yiisi li bas nyain. XML faal t čn'e b…õ (bu'osim [[$8|Kp…õ…õmnam la]]) lin…õ na t čn'e yiis t…Ēlis keŇč non-Wikimedia wiki ni.
wminc-infopage-text-tocreate: Wiki makir kaŇča nam p č pin'il…õ. F č ya'a buudi pian'ad kaŇča, f čn d…Ēl n…Ēzi'ela la b…õ [[$9]]. F č t čn'e maal zug lakir b…õ "{{PAGENAME}}/zug_lakir" n…õ zug lakir ka li l…õbig b…õ pian'ad kaŇča ni (tituunli "WPA/fr/Accueil" li ya'a an…õ French wiki makir).
wminc-infopage-text-toimport: Wiki kaŇča y…Ēn…õ ka b…Ē…Ēd ye li yii kp…õn' kp…õla na. F č ya'a na b…Ē…Ēd ye maligim pin'il t č čm kaŇča, m b…õllimn…õ gu'usum [[Special:ListUsers/import|importer]] ka ba ti zii lakisa w čsa yi wiki m…õŇčirin la yiiga.
wminc-infopage-text-awaiting-creation: Kp…õ…õmnam la gu'usidi maal čg ma'aa,  g…Ēsim "[[phabricator:$1|task $1]]".
wminc-infopage-text-approved-created: F č t čn'e ny…õ li b…õ $1
wminc-infopage-language-setlang-na: Pian'ad kaŇča p č siaki an t č čm kan…õ ka f č t čm nindaa la pian'ad nannanaa.
wminc-infopage-content-all-pages: Lakisa w čsa ban…õ b…õ kpansim wiki ni
wminc-infopage-req-meta-none: B…Ē…Ēdim bu'os čg kae [[$1|Meta-Wiki]] ([$2 create]) nii
wminc-infopage-req-unprefixed-templates: {{PLURAL: $1|$1 lakir|$1 lakisa}} b…õ d…Ēlisid unprefixed t…õmpulet namin.
wminc-infopage-req-error-wikisource: T č čm kaŇča an…õ "Wikisource". Wikisource d…õmisa nar ye li maal b…õ [[$1|Multilingual Wikisource]] ni.
wminc-infopage-req-error-wikiversity: T č čm kaŇča an…õ "wikiversity". Wikiversity d…õmisa nar ye li maal b…õ  [[$1|Beta Wikiversity]] la ni.
